scope.authority_posture: The target is accepted, but aoa-routing remains canonical until shadow parity and an explicit G5 owner-switch receipt.
scope.effect_stop_line: This model does not move code, publish routing artifacts, mutate the runtime mirror, admit a trust record, switch a consumer, or archive a repository.

operating_states.predecessor_posture: compatibility, security, deprecation, and rollback maintenance only
historical repository with consumer-zero and no operational rollback dependency

source_owner.eval_verdicts: aoa-evals or a stronger proof owner

projection_producer.shadow: aoa-routing canonical plus non-publishing aoa-sdk parity output

policy_owner.domain_constraints: the source organ named by each owner-qualified reference
policy_owner.approval_decision: the operator or policy authority named by ApprovalRequirement

authority_roles.approval_owner: the operator or policy authority named by ApprovalRequirement

evidence_producer.eval_evidence_and_verdict: aoa-evals or a stronger proof owner
evidence_producer.memory_receipt: aoa-memo or the selected session-memory owner

authority_roles.verdict_owner: aoa-evals or a stronger proof owner

closeout_owner.verdict_acceptance: aoa-evals or a stronger proof owner

operation_matrix.authority_owner: the source organ named by the object reference
operation_matrix.sdk_role: load compatibility-checked projections and preserve owner-qualified provenance
operation_matrix.stop_line: presence is not selection, activation, or copied source meaning

operation_matrix.sdk_role: rank candidates under explicit owner constraints
produce deterministic RouteDecision and structured RouteExplanation
operation_matrix.stop_line: resolution does not activate or execute

operation_matrix.authority_owner: the operator or policy authority named by ApprovalRequirement
operation_matrix.stop_line: the SDK cannot invent, infer, or bypass approval

operation_matrix.sdk_role: request activation through a negotiated runtime adapter
operation_matrix.stop_line: AoARunner is not an activation body

operation_matrix.sdk_role: consume typed ExecutionEvent references and coordinate lifecycle commands
operation_matrix.stop_line: the SDK core executes no model or tool work

operation_matrix.authority_owner: aoa-evals or a stronger proof owner
operation_matrix.sdk_role: correlate eval evidence and verdict references
operation_matrix.stop_line: runtime success is not an eval verdict

operation_matrix.authority_owner: aoa-memo or the selected session-memory owner
operation_matrix.sdk_role: carry retention requests and owner receipts by reference
operation_matrix.stop_line: the SDK does not copy canonical durable memory

operation_matrix.sdk_role: verify terminal prerequisites, transition to closed, and assemble CloseoutBundleRef
operation_matrix.stop_line: closing the SDK lifecycle does not replace runtime termination, proof acceptance, or durable retention

exit_conditions: all registered active consumers are green on SDK-produced artifacts
consumer-zero is proved for direct aoa-routing checkout dependencies
clean install, upgrade, downgrade, and rollback rehearsals pass
two consecutive SDK main or release validation cycles pass without predecessor generation
the runtime mirror and artifact-trust records identify the SDK source ref
no unresolved high-severity compatibility regression remains
window.calendar_duration: No arbitrary duration is inferred at R1; a release-owner calendar floor may be added before G5 without weakening these exit conditions.

repository_succession_policy.history_preservation: Preserve Git history, releases, decisions, and public provenance; do not copy historical scaffolding into the SDK by default.
repository_succession_policy.rollback_retirement: Retire the predecessor producer only after the compatibility exit conditions and consumer-zero are proved.
repository_succession_policy.archive_requirement: Separate exact operator approval after archive-readiness evidence; this R1 decision does not authorize archive or deletion.

non_goals: absorb agent, skill, playbook, eval, memo, KAG, stats, or runtime source authority
build a second abyss-stack or hide model/tool execution in the SDK
change the routing ABI during the owner-only switch
copy the predecessor repository topology wholesale
treat repository size reduction as cost proof
archive or delete aoa-routing before consumer-zero and exact operator approval
